title: Recent High Value Orders
description: Retrieve all orders placed within the 30-day period leading up to January 1, 2025, along with the corresponding customer names and order amounts, and return the results sorted in descending order of amount.
sql_solution: SELECT c.name, o.amount FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id WHERE o.date >= '2024-12-02' ORDER BY o.amount DESC;
pyspark_solution:
from pyspark.sql.functions import *

result = (
    customers.alias("c")
    .join(orders.alias("o"), col("c.id") == col("o.customer_id"), "inner")
    .filter(to_date(col("o.date")) >= lit("2024-12-02").cast("date"))
    .select(col("c.name").alias("name"), col("o.amount").alias("amount"))
    .orderBy(col("amount").desc())
)
